name: Nova Nurachman
shortBio: Building digital experiences that matter with modern web technologies.
fullBio: I am a passionate Solo Developer and the Founder of Logikraf. I specialize in building robust, high-performance web applications and digital experiences using modern technologies like Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. With a keen eye for design and a strong foundation in software engineering, I bridge the gap between aesthetics and functionality.
